<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.0.16 Chrome/132.0.6834.196 Electron/34.2.0 Safari/537.36" version="26.0.16"> <diagram name="Three-layer stack" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-629" dy="-215" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Mixtape — a strict three-layer stack
(dependencies point downward only)" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="30" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client" value="HTTP request → JSON response" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="35" width="280" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" value="routes/ — thin blueprints" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7f4f00;verticalAlign=top;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="130" width="880" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" value="songs.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" parent="L1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" value="playlists.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" parent="L1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="45" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" value="users.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" parent="L1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="45" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" value="feed.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" parent="L1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="45" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" value="services/ — business logic + all DB access" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#33557f;verticalAlign=top;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="300" width="880" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="streak_service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="L2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="15" y="45" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="feed_service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="L2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="185" y="45" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="search_service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="L2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="355" y="45" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="notification_service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="L2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="525" y="45" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" value="playlist_service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="L2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="695" y="45" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" value="models.py — SQLAlchemy ORM + to_dict()" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#4d6b33;verticalAlign=top;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="470" width="880" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" value="User · Song · Tag · ListeningEvent · Rating · Playlist · Notification
+ association tables: friendships · song_tags · playlist_entries" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="L3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="840" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" value="SQLite
(mixtape.db)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="390" y="630" width="180" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e0" value="HTTP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="client" target="L1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="calls one service" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="L1" target="L2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="queries / ORM" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="L2" target="L3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="SQL" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="L3" target="db" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" value="Parse the request, call ONE service, jsonify the result. No business logic, no DB queries. A service ValueError is caught here → 4xx JSON." style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#7f4f00;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="940" y="140" width="230" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" value="All business logic and DB access. Every bug in the hunt lived here. Validates inputs (raises ValueError), commits, and returns dicts — never ORM objects." style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#33557f;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="940" y="310" width="230" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" value="Schema + association tables. to_dict() is the serialization boundary crossed on the way back up." style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#4d6b33;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="940" y="480" width="230" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

(dependencies point downward only)

div.div: Parse the request, call ONE service, jsonify the result. No business logic, no DB queries. A service ValueError is caught here → 4xx JSON.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 287px; margin-left: 902px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #33557f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#33557f, #8eabcf); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: All business logic and DB access. Every bug in the hunt lived here. Validates inputs (raises ValueError), commits, and returns dicts — never ORM objects.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 902px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #4d6b33;

div.div: Schema + association tables. to_dict() is the serialization boundary crossed on the way back up.
